title: Some Simple Additions
description: A simple content mod that adds a new ore, armour set, tools, blocks and advancements showing progression
body:
This mod adds a new armor set, 2 sets of tools and weapons made post-nether with the new chlorophyte ore found in the deepslate level of the underground.
The content in this mod has the aim of trying to make the end of the base game a bit more rewarding and giving the player some new goals after aquiring netherite

Note: I plan on releasing the mod on other versions or maybe even fabric at some point but havent gotten round to doing so yet

edit: i kinda forgot about the mod☠️☠️

when i was working in it i ran into some really frustrating problems due to my inexperience that kinda made me stop working on it overtime

sorry, maybe ill come back at some point?

edit 2: im now working on a new mod, its been a while and im a bit rusty but in terms of quality to expect it should be fairly better than this mod due to already kinda knowing the basics, for now it will only be neoforge similar to this but i would like to bring it to forge, and fabric, the mod will be similar to this but larger in terms of scale (hopefully on release)
